title: sedum expansum
intro: Sedum expansum, also known as the orpine or mountain jellyfish, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Crassulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Sedum expansum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Sedum expansum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and promote tissue repair.
